form.label: LLM Performance
form.description: Deep dive into LLM model performance - latency, throughput, tokens, and efficiency metrics

search.query: `genai_llm_spans` | stats count by model_name | sort - count
`genai_llm_spans` | stats count by model_provider | sort - count
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ | eval avg = round(avg, 0)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as p95 from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ | eval p95 = round(p95, 0)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as total from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ | eval rpm = round(total / 60, 1)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) as total from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ | eval tps = round(total / 3600, 0)

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as total_requests sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as error_count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ | eval error_rate=round((error_count/total_requests)*100,2) | fields error_rate

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true median(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc75(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc90(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) perc99(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h median(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P50 perc75(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P75 perc90(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P90 perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P95 perc99(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as P99

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by GenAI_Span.latency_bucket | rename GenAI_Span.latency_bucket as latency_bucket | sort latency_bucket

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true sum(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h sum(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) as "Input Tokens" sum(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) as "Output Tokens"

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by GenAI_Span.token_bucket | rename GenAI_Span.token_bucket as token_bucket

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as requests avg(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as avg_latency perc50(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as p50_latency perc95(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as p95_latency perc99(GenAI_Span.duration_ms) as p99_latency avg(GenAI_Span.input_tokens) as avg_input avg(GenAI_Span.output_tokens) as avg_output sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as errors from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by GenAI_Span.model_name GenAI_Span.model_provider | rename GenAI_Span.* as * | eval error_rate = round((errors/requests)*100, 2) | eval avg_latency = round(avg_latency, 0) | eval p50_latency = round(p50_latency, 0) | eval p95_latency = round(p95_latency, 0) | eval p99_latency = round(p99_latency, 0) | eval avg_input = round(avg_input, 0) | eval avg_output = round(avg_output, 0) | sort - requests | table model_name, model_provider, requests, avg_latency, p50_latency, p95_latency, p99_latency, avg_input, avg_output, error_rate | rename model_name as "Model", model_provider as "Provider", requests as "Requests", avg_latency as "Avg (ms)", p50_latency as "P50 (ms)", p95_latency as "P95 (ms)", p99_latency as "P99 (ms)", avg_input as "Avg Input", avg_output as "Avg Output", error_rate as "Error %"

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.tokens_per_sec) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by _time span=1h GenAI_Span.model_name | timechart span=1h avg(GenAI_Span.tokens_per_sec) as "Tokens/sec" by GenAI_Span.model_name

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true avg(GenAI_Span.ttft_estimate) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.span_type=LLM GenAI_Span.model_name=$model_filter$ GenAI_Span.model_provider=$provider_filter$ by _time span=1h GenAI_Span.model_name | timechart span=1h avg(GenAI_Span.ttft_estimate) as "Est. TTFT (ms)" by GenAI_Span.model_name
